channel.title: Code by Ryan
channel.description: Recent content on Code by Ryan

item.title: About Me
item.description: I’m a software engineer from Kansas. I’ve lived in Africa and South America but I now happily reside in good ol' Kansas City. I’ve worked for small startups to large enterprises. Before I kicked off my professional software engineering career 6 years ago, I had been a freelance web developer and system administrator. If you’re interested in what I’ve done professionally, please add me on LinkedIn, https://www.linkedin.com/in/dataryan/. I’ve worked with a large swath of technologies on premise and in AWS.
